subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he and joy be unto him, for he hath attained unto My service throughout all his days. Verily, We make mention of him, and of My handmaiden and My leaf [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی له و نعیما له انه فاز بخدمتی فی ایامه بتمامها انا نذکره و امتی و ورقتی
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @praise and encouragement
